items.summary: Normalize and de-duplicate vendor categories on write in the backend (createVendor and updateVendorProfile) so stored vendor categories are consistent regardless of casing/extra whitespace.
Refine backend category filtering for listPublicVendorsByCategory so category matching is consistent with the frontend’s normalization rules and does not rely on substring matching.
Improve the vendor category selection UX in the VendorCategoryInput component so suggestions are easier to discover and keyboard navigation is more resilient.
